items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy — a positive signal that cyber resilience remains a policy priority. Separately, Scamwatch is warning Australians about food delivery scams, where criminals impersonate services like Uber Eats to steal payment details or personal information. These scams are easy to fall for, so always verify any unexpected messages about orders or account issues before clicking links.

On the technical side, a critical security flaw in Ivanti software was actively exploited within 24 hours of being publicly disclosed, highlighting how quickly attackers act. If your organisation uses Ivanti products, check with your IT team that patches have been applied promptly.

**Tip:** If you receive a food delivery message you weren't expecting, go directly to the app rather than clicking any links in the message.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches cyber security strategy phase two, setting national direction for digital protection.
